meta.title: Casebrain Hub — Evidence Index

pullRequest.note: preview — do not merge / do not deploy

restrictionsObserved: Phase 7 not begun or extended in this task

verificationRuns.limitation: Multiple TypeScript errors across lib/eval, integrity scripts, adapters
UnhandledSchemeError node:crypto via solicitor-output-gate client import graph
Requires Playwright auth setup and running server

claims.claim: Casebrain Hub is a multi-practice legal AI workspace whose current ship focus is the criminal defence solicitor pilot desk.
claims.remainingLimitation: Secondary housing/PI/firm-ops modules exist but are partial or UI-hidden; older docs overclaim completeness.

claims.claim: README claim that Casebrain Hub is production-ready is not supported by programme holds or this review's build/typecheck results.
claims.remainingLimitation: Marketing language contradicts do-not-deploy programme status.

claims.claim: Criminal five-tab matter desk (Overview/Court/Papers/Client Summary/CPS Chase) has been runtime-smoked with screenshots.
claims.remainingLimitation: Demo/smoke accounts; not a signed live-matter study.

claims.claim: H5 Overview smoke on production URL: 30 pass / 4 warn / 0 fail.
claims.remainingLimitation: Warnings include missing decision board / proof depth / trace panel in that run.

claims.claim: Controlled fictional PDF-backed proof at 3000 bundles with zero hard-safety failures.
claims.remainingLimitation: Controlled/synthetic only; doNotMerge/doNotDeploy true; not solicitor-reviewed real world.

claims.claim: Phase 0 discovery complete with N scale3000=3000, materialised=530, union=3530, baseline hits=2964 — not PASS.
claims.remainingLimitation: Discovery only; coverage gaps remain (uncertain families, unmaterialised scale IDs).

claims.claim: Phase 1 inventoried 51 solicitor output surfaces.
claims.remainingLimitation: Inventory is not safety; no artifacts PHASE-1-CHECKPOINT.md twin.

claims.claim: Phase 2 fail-closed containment complete for central wording exits — not corpus PASS.
claims.remainingLimitation: Containment ≠ corpus PASS.

claims.claim: Phase 3 CanonicalMatterStateV1 1.0.0 with rebuild equality on 530 fixtures; copyable raw occurrences 72 and trunc 28.
claims.remainingLimitation: Independent calculators still present at Phase 3 close (later migrated in Phase 6).

claims.claim: Phase 4 former blockers dispositioned; residual uncertain-family risk remains; not corpus PASS.
claims.remainingLimitation: mixed=281 uncertain=400 overlap=196; human FP/FN deferred to Phases 9/11; Phase 6 blob still says safe-but-unresolved.

claims.claim: Phase 5 structured composer v1.0.0; per-string stock raw=42 trunc=55 (different unit from 72/28).
claims.remainingLimitation: Must not equate 42/55 with 72/28; legacy composers remained at P5.

claims.claim: Phase 6 CLOSED with LEDGER_BALANCED; not corpus PASS; no merge/deploy.
claims.remainingLimitation: Corpus PASS open; Phase 7 not authorised by programme close holds.

claims.claim: confidence_dashboard migrated with canonical fingerprint exposed and match=true.
overview-presentation migrated to adapter; independent algorithm deprecated; counts match canonical.
claims.remainingLimitation: Deprecated adapter entry points may remain for call-site compatibility.

claims.claim: solicitor-matter-state migrated to canonical fingerprint.
No independent state calculators remain after Phase 6.
claims.remainingLimitation: Means no independent algorithms; wrappers may still exist.

claims.claim: All 31 central surfaces are contract-checked for fingerprint consistency.
claims.remainingLimitation: Contract harness ≠ full live UI proof on every surface.

claims.claim: 56 substantive omissions marked review-required; 0 non-substantive; silent substantive loss prevented.
claims.remainingLimitation: Stock omit path evidence; not a claim that all future omissions are handled.

claims.claim: Validator coverage: 31 central of 51 inventoried; 20 excluded as parent shells, gate=none, or parent-covered.
claims.remainingLimitation: Excluded surfaces rely on parent/shared gates; still inventoried.

claims.claim: Defence-plan-chat evidence joins remain gated but not fully structured-composer migrated.
claims.remainingLimitation: UNRESOLVED full structured migration.

claims.claim: Historical 72 copyable_exportable_rule_firing_occurrence dispositions: reconstructed 35, safely_omitted 1, proven_duplicate 36, still_blocked 0, retired_route 0, no_longer_reproducible 0.
claims.remainingLimitation: Unit is dual-mode batch firings, not unique strings.

claims.claim: prior-72-raw-occurrence-index.tsv contains 72 reconstructed occurrence IDs matching prior72RawMarkerMap.occurrences.
Historical 28 trunc occurrences = 14 safely_omitted copy + 14 proven_duplicate API = 14 unique fixtures.
claims.remainingLimitation: Different unit from current 55.

claims.claim: Current 55 per_string_copyable_hit = 14 baseline correspondent + 41 newly discovered deeper-walk; diagnostic len=21;hash=4dc9a04370a2.

claims.claim: Phase 3 72/28 use copyable_exportable_rule_firing_occurrence; Phase 5 42/55 use per_string_copyable_hit — must not be subtracted across units.
Security/RLS code review (2026-06-09) found no critical cross-org leak in API layer; residual risks remain; not a live policy audit.
claims.remainingLimitation: Review-only SQL hardening not applied; no pen-test/SOC2/ISO.

claims.claim: Pilot trust pack explicitly forbids claiming solicitor-validated real-world performance, certifications, or unsupervised rollout.
claims.remainingLimitation: Ops contacts/subprocessors still kick-off gated.

claims.claim: No dedicated accessibility (axe/WCAG/contrast) evidence pack found.
claims.remainingLimitation: Scattered aria attributes are not an audit.

claims.claim: No Lighthouse/Web Vitals/app performance artefact pack found.
claims.remainingLimitation: 3000-pack harness is correctness scale, not UX latency.

claims.claim: Production build currently fails on reviewed revision due to node:crypto UnhandledSchemeError in client import graph.
claims.remainingLimitation: Blocks production readiness regardless of integrity ledger strength.

claims.claim: npm run typecheck fails with multiple TypeScript errors on reviewed revision.
claims.remainingLimitation: Includes integrity programme scripts and eval harnesses.

claims.claim: Full Vitest run: 114 passed, 15 failed, 0 skipped.
claims.remainingLimitation: Some failures appear date-sensitive; validateCourtName ReferenceError indicates broken test wiring.

claims.claim: Phase 7 extraction/provenance boundary commit and artifacts exist on branch; programme README still lists 7–11 PENDING; this review did not begin or extend Phase 7.
claims.remainingLimitation: Not assessed as programme PASS; stop-for-review only.

claims.claim: Engineering quality/value to date is high for integrity and criminal pilot core.
claims.remainingLimitation: Value judgment based on evidence inventory; not a commercial valuation.

claims.claim: Application is not ready for unsupervised real-world production use of live legal cases today.
claims.remainingLimitation: Requires corpus PASS path, human gold review, build health, supervised pilot, security kick-off.
